biography: Tomas, representing Espoo Ringside Golf, has contributed to the competitive landscape of the Hector Trophée through his dedicated participation. Over three distinct editions of the tournament, he consistently engaged with the unique challenges presented by this esteemed pair competition.

During his three appearances, Tomas navigated the individual and team formats with earnest effort. While the coveted Hector Trophée and the individual Victor Trophy ultimately remained beyond his grasp, his consistent engagement demonstrated a deep respect for the tournament's essence.

As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, Tomas will not be among the competitors, having transitioned from active play within the event. His presence over the years, marked by a steadfast commitment to the greens, ensures his place among those who have shaped the tournament's unfolding history.
